word: H6006 - עָמַס - ʻâmaç - aw-mas' - Be borne

sections.paragraph:
Original: עמשׂ עמס

Transliteration: ‛âmas ‛âmaś

Phonetic: aw-mas'

BDB Definition:

  1. to load, carry, carry a load
    1. (Qal)
      1. to load
      2. to carry a load
    2. (Hiphil) to lay a load on

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1643

Part(s) of speech: Verb
